query_normalized: predicting molecular reactivity using graph neural networks and public databases chemistry
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the foundational methodology and graph properties (homophily/heterophily) that determine the performance of Graph Neural Networks, which is a critical component of the user's question regarding GNNs for molecular reactivity (Category d and f).
